title: Estimates of Location and Variability
description: A flowchart illustrating the key statistical estimators used to measure the central tendency (location) and spread (variability) of a dataset, and how they inform model assumptions.
elements: Estimates of Variability (Variance, Standard Deviation, Range, IQR)
relationships: A Dataset is analyzed to calculate Estimates of Location
A Dataset is analyzed to calculate Estimates of Variability
Estimates of Location and Variability are used together to check Model Assumptions
